cards.back: A morphological operation that reduces the size of the image by removing small objects or noise, using a structuring element
A morphological operation that increases the size of the image by adding small objects or noise, using a structuring element
A morphological operation that combines erosion and dilation, removing small objects or noise while preserving larger objects
A morphological operation that combines dilation and erosion, removing noise or small objects while preserving larger objects
A morphological operation that performs a logical operation (AND or OR) between an image and a structuring element, often used for edge detection
